# zennode public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zennode.txt 523 lines (supported surface) | zennode.features.txt 45 added (features: derive,json-schema,serde,std) | zennode.internal.txt 83 lines (83 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                11
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        57
#   pub consts/statics                         14
#   inherent methods                          108
#   struct fields                             188
#   enum variants                             152
#   re-exports                                  2
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        83
#   auto-trait-complete types                  21
#   auto-trait exceptions                       2
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          236
#   error                            21
#   format                           17
#   kv                               40
#   ordering                         16
#   param                            32
#   registry                         24
#   schema                          124
#   traits                           14
#   version                           8

## items (499 lines)

pub trait NodeDef: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static [also: traits]
